title: Backtest 01 · Renzo ezETH LRT Depeg
outcome: 24 Apr 2024 — ezETH depeg ke ~$688 di Uniswap; >$65 juta liquidations (Morpho, Gearbox); pemicu = akhir window airdrop + likuiditas sekunder tipis + leverage looping unwinding + tokenomics REZ membingungkan (airdrop 5%); pulih cepat.

title: Backtest 02 · Helium Multi-token Simplification
outcome: HIP-138 (awal 2025) — Helium menghentikan emisi IOT & MOBILE dan mengonsolidasikan seluruh tokenomics ke HNT tunggal; 18,2 miliar MOBILE dibakar.
source: examples/CaseStudies is not deep for Helium; see examples/Pioneer/Helium.md + findas/IQ.wiki

title: Backtest 03 · Oracle Infra (negative control)
outcome: Proyek oracle/infra murni tanpa airdrop-farm, restaking, atau multi-token TIDAK boleh memicu pola kegagalan (P1–P5). Menguji harness tidak "over-fire".
